h5abdc71cga4e0g45f3g9a77gf70365877f90: I saw our gith friend inspecting you.
h61589f0cg58feg47b7gb56dg790a163e50d6: I have to say, I thought you'd look worse, but no. Not a tentacle to be seen.
h1a57e60cg8720g4da8g80d7gafec7205b23c: That's what everyone's saying. Is it so strange?
h1d43e988gad59g4e55g8183g13138418a40e: It's unexpected, but we shan't complain.
he5539e97g5e5cg46e9g98c5g3d246c04599a: I'm not taking anything for granted, of course. First sign of change and I'll have to stop that pretty little heart of yours.
h3f5ba0c9g4503g496aga8f3g4ea8bad3d3e3: I am open to suggestions. Knives, poison, strangulation - whatever you'd prefer.
hccc7f218g8ceag448agb277g027f0f4475f2: Well now you're just being close-minded. There are some lovely ways to go.
h2eaab47eg56b7g441dg8c30gc43a8f75970e: I've watched urchins freeze to death on the street. It looks peaceful - just like falling asleep.
haa7a82bfg802bg4368gbe76ga09eb7797953: Come on, humour me. If you had to choose...
h8feadc8dg3797g4b36gae1dga268c3c32c48: Then I suppose we'll just see what happens.
h01e5a121g498fg4d0eg9978g7dfaeb9826e1: Don't worry, darling. I like you. I'm sure I'll make the right choice.
hf819c97bg228bg4b23gb8a4g8f6a46a66adb: I'd rather have one of the others do it.
h0a569de1g2aa4g4c2dg9159gaa6facf6f0d1: Oh, I see how it is.
hfe45d3eeg979ag4819gaf38gb676712f184b: Fine, but if they botch it - don't come bleeding to me.
h68415d9fgc00eg4049g85bbgc067f7a38540: Then I'll ask someone else to do it.
h96a94c42gd9bcg41e6gb7e9g8c51d23ff036: A classic! One good thrust to the heart and you're gone.
h5ed50d29gc725g49ccgba8bg31055a10e7a4: We need a good blade, of course. Don't want to waste time hacking and prodding with a dinner knife...
hb712b7e1gcf26g4661gaa89g17ee7d195079: Well, I'm getting ahead of myself. This is all a worst case scenario, obviously.
h6bcda775ge150g49c4g98abg74a0154f2dc1: Obviously. But that won't happen. It can't.
hcb2266e8gf9a1g40adg95d3ge107bdf9823f: If the last day has taught me anything, it's that the impossible is more likely than you think.
h284bbc51g1a70g48e1g865cgfa8aa4c5359f: Now, let's get some rest? The sooner we start tomorrow, the better our chances of keeping this hypothetical.
hf185c3b4g3432g4658gbed3g8b48a3a8231c: And you? How should I kill you?
h7b1e1e1bgaf2eg4192gad6bg13bff7001221: Ha! Oh, my dear. I'd like to see you try.
hf2738ccagdd1dg4c37g95fag2699374cf2c5: Ha! Oh, my boy. I'd like to see you try.
hf0ce5ccfg8479g4237gb5bdg408ccdf5f478: See you in the morning. Sweet dreams, darling.
h90a5c5b0gdc6fg4e04g9de2g3f5c8d94cb52: A fine choice! I can think of some nightshades that are deliciously fatal.
h1033d786ge501g47a4gb2f7g72c7bc252591: If they're mixed well, you'll just close your eyes and drift away. And if they're not...
hacfb870bg45aag4860ga6e3g96d988c09921: Try it and I'll spill your guts.
hf3e3bbd1g0024g40a8g9575g80a5fef2ae38: Don't be so pig-headed, I'm being practical.
he8b114c6g9addg4235gadd8gb4f1c4274bbf: How much damage will you cause if you transform? How much blood can you bear to have on your hands?
ha287f77dg6805g4564ga72cg7024814bbbbb: I like you. Rest assured, whatever happens, I'll make the right choice.
h92495340g0599g4bc4g8e54g19af5be78184: If I had to choose, I'd want the knife. Make it quick.
h27e78729g60aeg4ee6g85f6g79c77a65c1f7: If I die, I'll take you with me.
h36c3b1dfg28c1g4290gb3f3ge9241510ef51: Ha! I do like you, you know. You've got fire.
h594d95e1g8fb8g4542ga237ga47dacb07097: Whatever happens, I'll make the right choice.
heca9885dga1f1g468dga713g96567f289014: Not sure. How would you like to go?
h917c4a4bgd24cg428egbc37g315d09616e8c: I don't think poison is for me. Nor stabbing, come to think of it.
he269d0bdg6704g424fga302gea5473088565: I've always felt decapitation was a fine choice. One good swing and then - nothing.
h263bba48g4ad6g4b1bgaa11g127d0350edbe: But we were talking about you. What'll it be?
h0bb80532ga46cg48cfg86f7g398311f54b3c: A fine choice. Now, to use sword or axe? Or a saw? Hmm.
h534f6f06gd025g4409gb95bg79716acce0d2: I'm hoping it'll stay that way.
ha90596begea01g4fb4g9e69g7611e06b3d15: Naturally. But I was thinking: what if it doesn't?
hf7f0e696ga5b7g4d62ga462g287addd61304: Of course, first sign of change and I'll have to stop that pretty little heart of yours.
ha3b9ebd2gca3dg409ag887agaf9f5917e1f1: I could say the same to you.
h6b900f8dgd189g4b81g9f9ag73969ff0620f: Indeed you could. We're all doing surprisingly well, given the circumstances.
h76d01c6fg8da5g4159ga455g2ab41331bf03: I saw you getting a lecture from our magical friend.
h300825b6g5955g47cag8dbegd2032bc3ebf1: Sounds like you've been learning all about your gruesome future.
h3667a8b8g9707g4965g974egeeb785beda8c: So. Not a tentacle to be seen.
